all.critique:
Below are several points of concern I identified when comparing the analysis against the rubric:

1. Forward Method Input Unused (Low Severity)  
 • The forward() method is defined as taking an input tensor (x: torch.Tensor), but the analysis shows that x isn’t used at all. This isn’t a fatal flaw since the method’s role is just to return learned parameters (X′ and U′), yet it might be confusing for future readers or developers who expect x to be used. A comment or clarification on the role of t
